2264760.name: Lifetime
2264760.description: Awakening in a land among the stars, a cat explores The Cosmic Island of Recollection in order to regain memories of the life that came before. This story is meant to bring peace to those who have felt the pain of losing a dear member of their family. You will explore the Island in this Third-person exploration visual novel and discover all 13 glowing Memories to complete the story and move on to the life that comes after. You will be able to complete the game without collecting all 13 memories, which will allow you to experience the story in a much richer way by playing through the game more than once.
2264760.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
